cast_iron_barrel.title: Upgrade your cannon to a Cast Iron Barrel (requires TFMG cast iron ingots)

subtitle.text: Longer barrel. Less recoil. More reason to use it.

description: The Cast Iron Barrel requires TFMG Cast Iron.
Which requires the Industrial Blast Furnace path.
Which required building the oil chain first.
The cannon improves because the factory improved.
Everything connects. The steam age made the factory.
The oil age makes the cannon viable at range.
Delay Fuze sets a countdown before detonation.
Useful for arced shots where impact fuze would detonate on terrain.
AP Shell penetrates multiple blocks before detonating inside.
→ Upgrade to a Cast Iron Barrel [check]
